Text:
We were delighted to welcome Hitchin's MP Alistair Strathern to the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 yesterday.

Alistair took the time to visit the festival and stopped by to meet the team from Feed Up Warm Up, the Hitchin-based charity we are proud to support. Feed Up Warm Up do vital work in our community and having their stand at the festival gives them a chance to connect with local people and raise awareness of what they do. It was great to see Alistair showing his support for both the festival and the charity.

https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent #FeedUpWarmUp #AlistairStrathern

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
